_publications._publicationTitle: The haploinsufficient hematopoietic microenvironment is critical to the pathological fracture repair in murine models of neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: a significantly lower number of osteoblasts was observed in Nf1+/−, PeriCre and PeriCre mice compared to WT mice
details: Had significantly lower number of osteoblasts compared to WT mice in tibial trabecular bone
